name: Frank Elicia
subtitle: the observing owner · discipline of the measure

ultimate_ability.label: The Right Ratio
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Convert the OFF-POUR/GLARE second-stat gauge by half: whatever it is right now, halve it (round down). The room learns the ratio you set.

notes: Frank's hand · used for BOTH Temperance (at mixing_glass) and Sun (at solenade_garden). Second stat: OFF-POUR (temperance) or GLARE (sun). Scenarios override starting_hand per-scenario; temperance starters are the default here. Sun starters via setup starting_hand: sit_in_sun/walk_path/tend_bed/read_sundial.
